summary: Testing complete for Unsplash image fix. All backend API tests passed (14/14). Frontend image rendering verified: hero images on recipe pages, recipe card thumbnails on explore/homepage, photographer credits with clickable links. Fixed bug in TranslatedRecipeCard.jsx where image_url wasn't being read from metadata.
critical_code_review_comments: TranslatedRecipeCard.jsx had a bug where it only checked metadata.photos[0].image_url, not metadata.image_url from Unsplash - FIXED
Both RecipeCard.jsx (lines 74-78) and RecipePage.jsx (lines 430-460) correctly handle image_url with photographer credit
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Unsplash image integration tests pass. Verified: 1) Recipe API returns image_url, image_alt, image_metadata 2) Translation API returns same in metadata 3) RecipePage hero image renders with photographer credit link 4) RecipeCard shows Unsplash images on homepage/explore 5) TranslatedRecipeCard now correctly reads image_url from metadata (bug fixed) 6) Recipes without images render gracefully with ChefHat placeholder. Known recipes with images: risotto-alla-milanese-italy, pizza-margherita-italy, spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy, tonkotsu-ramen-japan.

backend_api_tests.TestRecipeAPIImageData: 6/6 passed - image_url, image_alt, image_metadata returned correctly
backend_api_tests.TestTranslationAPIImageMetadata: 5/5 passed - image data in metadata for all languages
backend_api_tests.TestTranslationRecipesListAPI: 1/1 passed - recipes list returns image_url in metadata
backend_api_tests.TestGracefulFallbackNoImage: 1/1 passed - recipes without images handled gracefully
backend_api_tests.TestPhotographerCredit: 1/1 passed - photographer name and URL in image_metadata

frontend_ui_tests.HomePage: PASSED - Recipe cards show Unsplash images
frontend_ui_tests.RecipePage_HeroImage: PASSED - Hero image renders with data-testid='recipe-hero-image'
frontend_ui_tests.ExplorePage_TranslatedRecipeCard: PASSED - Cards show Unsplash images after fix
frontend_ui_tests.GracefulFallback: PASSED - Recipes without images render correctly with no hero section

bug_fixed.issue: Only checked metadata.photos[0].image_url, not metadata.image_url from Unsplash
bug_fixed.fix: Added fallback to metadata.image_url when photos array is empty
